description: As the IT Director for a retail and logistics company expanding into the Midwest, provision a new site in Snipe-IT. Create the 'Chicago Distribution Center' location (500 W Monroe St, Chicago, IL 60661, US) and a 'Logistics' department within it. Register a new user, Thomas Rivera (username: trivera, email: thomas.rivera@example.com, password: SecurePass2025!, job title: Logistics Coordinator), assigned to the Logistics department at the Chicago Distribution Center. Update assets ASSET-D001 and ASSET-D002 with the Chicago Distribution Center as their default location, including the note 'Transferred to Chicago DC for Midwest expansion - March 2025'. Check out asset
